name: Kenyan-Style Collard Greens with Lemon
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Plum tomatoes, peeled, Seed and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the collard greens in several changes of water. Remove the stems.
Stack the greens a few at a time and cut crosswise into 1/2-inch wide strips.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil, add the collard greens and cook for 10 minutes.
Drain and rinse with cold water. Squeeze out the excess moisture.
2. Heat the oil in a large skillet. Add the onion and jalapeno; sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Add the tomatoes and cook for 1 minute.
4. Stir in the greens, salt, and pepper. Cook for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the lemon juice and cook for 1 minute. Serve.
